# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

class SendgridMailer < ActionMailer::Base
  DEFAULT_HOSTS = {
    "development" => "localhost:3000",
    "test"        => "localhost:3000",
    "production"  => ENV["APP_HOST"]
  }.freeze

  default from: -> { ENV.fetch("DEFAULT_FROM_EMAIL", "no-reply@#{default_host}") }

  def sendgrid_send(to:, subject:, html: nil, text: nil, from: nil, reply_to: nil, cc: nil, bcc: nil, attachments: [])
    mail = build_mail(
      to: to,
      subject: subject,
      html: html,
      text: text,
      from: from || default_params[:from],
      reply_to: reply_to,
      cc: cc,
      bcc: bcc,
      attachments: attachments
    )

    deliver_via_sendgrid!(mail)
  end

  def deliver_via_sendgrid!(mail)
    raise "Missing SENDGRID_API_KEY" if sendgrid_api_key.blank?

    payload = {
      personalizations: [
        {
          to: normalize_recipients(mail.to).map { |e| { email: e } },
          cc: normalize_recipients(mail.cc).map { |e| { email: e } }.presence,
          bcc: normalize_recipients(mail.bcc).map { |e| { email: e } }.presence
        }.compact
      ],
      from: { email: (mail.from || []).first || default_params[:from] },
      reply_to: mail.reply_to.present? ? { email: mail.reply_to.first } : nil,
      subject: mail.subject.to_s,
      content: build_content(mail)
    }.compact

    if mail.attachments.any?
      payload[:attachments] = mail.attachments.map do |att|
        {
          content: Base64.strict_encode64(att.body.decoded),
          filename: att.filename.to_s,
          type: att.mime_type.to_s,
          disposition: att.content_disposition.to_s.presence || "attachment"
        }.compact
      end
    end

    response = sendgrid_client.post("mail/send", json: payload)

    unless response.success?
      raise SendgridDeliveryError.new(
        status: response.status,
        body: response.body.to_s,
        request: payload
      )
    end

    response
  end

  private

  def build_mail(to:, subject:, html:, text:, from:, reply_to:, cc:, bcc:, attachments:)
    m = mail(to: to, subject: subject, from: from, reply_to: reply_to, cc: cc, bcc: bcc) do |format|
      format.text { render plain: text.to_s } if text.present?
      format.html { render html: html.to_s.html_safe } if html.present?
    end

    Array(attachments).each do |a|
      filename = (a[:filename] || a["filename"]).to_s
      content  = a[:content] || a["content"]
      mime     = a[:mime_type] || a["mime_type"] || a[:type] || a["type"] || "application/octet-stream"
      disposition = a[:disposition] || a["disposition"] || "attachment"
      next if filename.blank? || content.nil?

      m.attachments[filename] = { mime_type: mime, content: content, content_disposition: disposition }
    end

    m
  end

  def build_content(mail)
    parts = []
    text_part = extract_part(mail, "text/plain") || mail.text_part
    html_part = extract_part(mail, "text/html") || mail.html_part

    if text_part&.body.present?
      parts << { type: "text/plain", value: text_part.body.decoded }
    end

    if html_part&.body.present?
      parts << { type: "text/html", value: html_part.body.decoded }
    end

    if parts.empty?
      body = mail.body&.decoded.to_s
      parts << { type: "text/plain", value: body }
    end

    parts
  end

  def extract_part(mail, mime_type)
    return nil unless mail.respond_to?(:parts) && mail.parts.present?
    mail.parts.find { |p| p.mime_type == mime_type }
  end

  def normalize_recipients(value)
    Array(value).flatten.compact.map(&:to_s).flat_map { |v| v.split(/[,\s]+/) }.map(&:strip).reject(&:blank?).uniq
  end

  def sendgrid_client
    @sendgrid_client ||= SendgridClient.new(api_key: sendgrid_api_key)
  end

  def sendgrid_api_key
    ENV["SENDGRID_API_KEY"].to_s
  end

  def default_host
    env = Rails.env.to_s
    DEFAULT_HOSTS[env].presence || ENV["APP_HOST"].presence || "localhost:3000"
  end

  class SendgridDeliveryError < StandardError
    attr_reader :status, :body, :request

    def initialize(status:, body:, request:)
      @status = status
      @body = body
      @request = request
      super("SendGrid delivery failed (status=#{status}): #{body}")
    end
  end

  class SendgridClient
    def initialize(api_key:)
      @api_key = api_key
      @connection = Faraday.new(url: "https://api.sendgrid.com/v3") do |f|
        f.request :json
        f.response :raise_error
        f.adapter Faraday.default_adapter
      end
    end

    def post(path, json:)
      resp = @connection.post(path) do |req|
        req.headers["Authorization"] = "Bearer #{@api_key}"
        req.headers["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
        req.body = json
      end
      Response.new(resp.status, resp.body)
    rescue Faraday::Error => e
      status = e.response && e.response[:status]
      body = e.response && e.response[:body]
      Response.new(status || 0, body || e.message, success: false)
    end

    class Response
      attr_reader :status, :body

      def initialize(status, body, success: nil)
        @status = status.to_i
        @body = body
        @success = success
      end

      def success?
        return @success unless @success.nil?
        (200..299).cover?(@status)
      end
    end
  end
end
